data.title: CobbleStone Software & Theorem to showcase contract AI benefits at "AI Live" on Jan. 28, 2026. Productivity boost for legal teams.
data.description: CobbleStone Software and Theorem are set to present "AI Live" on January 28, 2026. This event will demonstrate how cutting-edge contract AI technology is revolutionizing legal processes by simplifying workflows, boosting efficiency, and providing legal teams with advanced automation. The event will take place in Princeton, N.J., and is expected to draw attention to the significant benefits that AI brings to the legal sector.

data.title: Parrish Medical Center wins multiple court rulings against Omni Healthcare, Craig Deligdish. Legal losses mount.
data.description: In Titusville, Florida on January 23, 2026, Parrish Medical Center, a local community hospital, achieved success in various legal battles against Omni Healthcare, Inc. and its owner, Craig Deligdish. This independent public hospital emerged victorious in several court and administrative decisions. More details regarding the cases were not disclosed.

data.title: Real Estate Split Corp (TSX: RS) will distribute dividends to Class A shareholders in January 2026.
data.description: Real Estate Split Corp. (TSX: RS) recently disclosed that a distribution for January 2026 will be paid out to Class A shareholders. The Fund's announcement, made in Toronto on Jan. 23, 2026, outlined the details of the distribution. Shareholders can expect a payout according to the set parameters.

data.title: NextNRG terminates At-the-Market Sales Agreement with ThinkEquity LLC, H.C. Wainwright & Roth Capital Partners, effective Jan. 17, 2026.
data.description: Miami, Florida - NextNRG, Inc. (NASDAQ:NXXT), a leader in AI-powered energy advancements revolutionizing energy production and distribution, disclosed the discontinuation of its At the Market Sales Agreement with ThinkEquity LLC, H.C. Wainwright & Co., LLC, and Roth Capital Partners, LLC. The termination, effective from January 17, 2026, marks a significant development in the company's strategic financial operations.

data.title: Over 20M patients globally benefit from da Vinci surgery, enhancing patient outcomes with Intuitive's technology.
data.description: The success highlights the commitment of surgeons and healthcare teams across the globe in enhancing patient results by utilizing Intuitive's advanced minimally invasive technologies. This achievement underscores the growing acceptance and adoption of Intuitive's cutting-edge medical solutions, showcasing the significant impact they are having on patient care and outcomes worldwide.

data.title: SEALSQ and WISeKey launch "Year of Quantum Security" at Davos, shifting focus in global cybersecurity; AI losing ground.
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland, on January 23, 2026, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) and WISeKey International Holding Ltd (“WISeKey”) (SIX: WIHN, NASDAQ: WKEY) launched the "Year of Quantum Security" at Davos. SEALSQ specializes in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, while WISeKey is a prominent player in cybersecurity, blockchain, and IoT. This initiative signifies a significant shift in global cybersecurity priorities, with quantum security taking precedence over Artificial Intelligence in importance and urgency. This change reflects the growing recognition of the importance of quantum security in international discussions.

data.title: UBS plans to offer Bitcoin and Ethereum trading to wealthy clients starting in Switzerland, with potential expansion.
data.description: UBS Group AG, the largest wealth manager globally with assets totaling $4.7 trillion, is getting ready to introduce Bitcoin and Ethereum trading services to a specific group of private banking clients in Switzerland. The company plans to later extend this service to clients in the Asia-Pacific region and the United States. The bank is currently in the process of choosing partners for this new crypto offering after engaging in discussions for several months. Although a final decision on the specifics of the rollout is yet to be made, UBS is focusing on initially offering Bitcoin and Ethereum trading exclusively to chosen private banking clients in Switzerland. The bank is opting to collaborate with external partners instead of developing an in-house solution for this venture. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Atley Solutions sells two C100 modules to Perceptive Discovery in strategic collaboration focused on Astatine-211.
data.description: In Sweden's Gothenburg and London, UK, on January 23rd, 2026, Atley Solutions and Perceptive Discovery disclosed a deal wherein two Atley C100 modules were sold by Atley Solutions to Perceptive Discovery. This transaction signifies the initial phase of a partnership focused on enhancing drug development capabilities.

data.title: L3Harris increases quarterly cash dividend from $1.20 to $1.25; new annual rate $5.00; payable March 20, 2026.
data.description: The Board of Directors of L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has announced a raise in the company's quarterly cash dividend rate per share from $1.20 to $1.25, starting with the first quarter dividend of the year. The payment, scheduled for March 20, 2026, will be given to shareholders registered as of March 6, 2026. This adjustment increases the yearly rate from $4.80 to $5.00. L3Harris Technologies is a Trusted Disruptor in the tech industry.

data.title: Merrill Edge earns praise for website security & usability from customers, ranking among IBD's top 10 online brokers for 2026.
data.description: Merrill Edge, recognized as one of the top 10 Online Brokers for 2026 by IBD, has garnered significant customer satisfaction for its website security and wealth management services. Customers are pleased with the platform's safety and user-friendly interface.

data.title: JPMorgan's self-directed investing beats competitors with trade execution, speed, and price per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: JPMorgan Self-Directed Investing, recognized as one of the top 10 Best Online Brokers by IBD, has garnered a strong customer base due to its efficient trade execution, quick transaction speeds, and competitive pricing. The platform's success in fending off smaller, more agile competitors showcases its ability to meet customer demands effectively.

data.title: Vanguard stands out with low costs and large scale, named one of IBD's top 10 online brokers for 2026, excelling in customer service.
data.description: Vanguard, recognized as one of the top 10 online brokers for 2026 by IBD, has gained high customer satisfaction for its customer service and research tools. Leveraging its cost efficiency and expansive reach, Vanguard has distinguished itself in the market.

data.title: Fidelity's online brokerage recognized for reliability, consistency. Top 10; customers drawn to security, execution, prices.
data.description: Fidelity Investments, recognized as one of the top 10 Best Online Brokers by Investor's Business Daily, has garnered a strong customer base due to its focus on website security, efficient trade execution, and competitive pricing. The accolades highlight Fidelity's commitment to providing reliable and consistent service to its clients, further solidifying its reputation in the industry.

data.title: Crypto IPO BitGo saw 35% surge above initial offering price on day one of 2026; gains were later pared back.
data.description: The latest crypto IPO of 2026, BitGo, experienced a strong start on its first day by surging 35% above its initial offering price. However, it later retreated from those gains. This marked a significant event as the first crypto IPO of the year. The post-IPO performance on day two is awaited with anticipation in the investment community.

data.title: IBD's 2026 list ranks top 10 online brokers based on customer service and value, as per investors' responses.
data.description: The list of top online brokers for 2026 by IBD reveals the firms that investors acclaim for exceptional customer service and value. These 10 brokerages stand out amongst the competition, as per the latest report from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Farcaster to refund $180M to investors during shift to 'developer-centered approach,' says co-founder Dan Romero.
data.description: "Farcaster will remain operational," stated Dan Romero, co-founder of Merkle, amidst the transition of the project to new ownership.

data.title: DOOR (formerly Latch) files Q2 2025 SEC report, aims to regain reporting status with Q3 2025 update.
data.description: DOOR, formerly known as Latch, Inc., is anticipated to restore its current reporting status upon releasing its Q3 2025 report. The Company, based in St. Louis, disclosed that it has submitted its Form 10-Q for the three-month period ending in September 2025. This development indicates progress towards fulfilling regulatory requirements, with DOOR aiming to provide stakeholders with transparent and up-to-date financial information.

data.title: SLB Limited sees improvement, bets on data centers with Q4 revenue of $9.745B, EPS at 55 cents, net income $824M. Margins down YoY.
data.description: SLB Limited (NYSE: SLB) reported fourth-quarter results with revenue reaching $9.745 billion, a 5% increase from a year earlier, surpassing the $9.547 billion analyst expectation. Diluted GAAP earnings per share were 55 cents, down from 77 cents the previous year, while diluted EPS, excluding charges, stood at 78 cents, down from 92 cents a year before, but above the 74-cent estimate. Net income attributable to SLB amounted to $824 million, a decrease from $1.095 billion in the prior year. Adjusted EBITDA was $2.331 billion, lower than the $2.382 billion recorded the previous year. Despite lower margins year over year, there was a sequential improvement. The fourth-quarter cash flow from operations totaled $3.01 billion, and free cash flow amounted to $2.29 billion, which included $71 million of ChampionX acquisition-related payments. These results reflected an increase in global upstream activity stabilization, supported by growth in Production Systems and Digital, with strong year-end demand and contributions from the ChampionX acquisition.
